A WEDDING BLESSING
✦ 🌹 ✦
FROM THE HEART

With All Our Love

Dearest Sakthi & Puvaneshwari,

On this most joyful of days, we celebrate the beautiful union of two wonderful souls. May your love be as timeless as the stars, as deep as the ocean, and as warm as the golden light of dawn.

May every day of your journey together overflow with laughter, tenderness, and the quiet joy of knowing you have found your person.

Wishing you a lifetime of happiness — today and always. 💛

🌸
Sakthi & Puvaneshwari

MARRIED WITH LOVE · 2026
